name: Golf Ball
provenance: Mass/diameter: USGA/R&A Rules of Golf, Equipment Rules (max mass 45.93 g, min diameter 42.67 mm). Cd≈0.25 for a dimpled golf ball (dimples trip the boundary layer, delaying separation well below a smooth sphere's drag crisis): Bearman & Harvey, 'Golf ball aerodynamics', Aeronautical Quarterly 27 (1976).
